title: polifolia montana var. latifolia
intro: Polifolia montana var. latifolia, also known as the bog labrador tea or Labrador tea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family and is native to the boreal forests of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polifolia montana var. latifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include making a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be used to treat various health conditions, or using it as a tincture or infusion in traditional medicine.
